docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A., FORMALLY KNOWN AS BANK OF  AMERICA N.A., AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLORY, ANDRE L DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-07-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-21-2008
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A., FORMALLY KNOWN AS BANK OF  AMERICA N.A.,
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-07-2008 CONTINUED TO MAY-23-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A., FORMALLY KNOWN AS BANK OF  AMERICA N.A., ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 HOURS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-23-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2008 CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-02-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MICHAEL D. KAHN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-16-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR# 11332. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-01-2008 CONTINUED TO DEC-03-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE ADDRESS CHANGE, FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
